creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: rm
Date: Mon Nov  7 09:32:03 UTC 2016
New revision: 425597
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/425597

Log:
  x11/xcb-proto: fix build with pathon3

  Add upstream patches to fix build/packaging with python3 as default after
  the recent update. python3 is not default, so no PORTREVISION bump is required.

  PR:		214279
  Submitted by:	John W. O'Brien <john@saltant.com>
  Approved by:	portmgr (just-fix-it blanket)

Changes:
  head/x11/xcb-proto/Makefile
  head/x11/xcb-proto/files/
  head/x11/xcb-proto/files/patch-xcbgen_align.py
  head/x11/xcb-proto/files/patch-xcbgen_xtypes.py
